Who Are We?

"Where stories, numbers, and history grow together."

Brooklyn Born  ·  Boston Raised  ·  Tyler Made  ·  Built for Every Explorer Worldwide 🌍

Meet the founder

The Explorer Behind the Tree

I'm Rome Pearson — born in Brooklyn, New York, raised in Brooklyn and Mattapan, Massachusetts, and now planting roots in Tyler, Texas. Over the past 30+ years I've led restaurant teams, operated satellite networks for a global corporation, trained hundreds of employees, and graduated as class valedictorian. I've always found a way to grow wherever I was planted.

"It started as a search for a niche and a way to generate income remotely. It became a calling."

Last year, I saw an opportunity to build something entirely my own — from home, on my own terms. That's how PearTree Explorers Tutoring was born. A warm, joyful, and accessible space where children can discover the magic of stories, numbers, and history — guided by our beloved mascot Lil' Romey, delivered via Zoom, in English and in Spanish.

I'm Rome — and this is my greatest adventure yet.

¡Se habla Español! 🌿

Meet our Spokesperson · Narrator · Mascot · Leader

Say Hello to Lil' Romey!

Lil' Romey ⭐

Every great adventure needs a great guide — and ours is Lil' Romey, the animated heart and soul of PearTree Explorers Tutoring!

Dressed in his signature tan suit and green tie, Lil' Romey stands for everything we believe in: curiosity, confidence, and the absolute joy of learning. He is our spokesperson, narrator, mascot, and leader — the warm, friendly face children and families see across every platform, every session, and every episode.

Whether guiding an explorer through a story in the library, leading a math adventure in the orchard, or greeting families on YouTube, Lil' Romey's message is always the same:

"Let's explore together!" 🌳

Spokesperson Narrator Mascot Leader YouTube Host Zoom Guide Ages 4–10+

What we believe

Our Roots Run Deep

📖

Stories Matter

Every child deserves to fall in love with reading. We make stories come alive with warmth and imagination.

🔢

Numbers Are Fun

Math isn't scary — it's an adventure waiting to be discovered by every young explorer.

🏛️

History Connects Us

Understanding where we came from helps children understand who they truly are.

🌎

Bilingual by Design

Learning in two languages opens two worlds. Sessions available in English and Spanish.

🏠

Home is the Classroom

Via Zoom, we bring joyful learning directly to your child — wherever you are in the world.

💛

Excellence with Heart

Every session and every episode delivered with the care every child deserves.
